feedback.name: windows-shell-quoting-divergence

decision.name: subagent-tool-matcher-per-ide
decision.description: IdeAdapter.subAgentToolMatcher is a per-IDE string field; future adapters declare their own sub-agent tool name without touching hooks-settings-service.

rule.name: sub-agent-resource-lifecycle-red-line
rule.description: Sub-agent resource lifecycle red line — not "more is better"; create responsibly (batch ≤ 6, business subdivide ≤ 2 layers) + must reclaim (dispatch record with lifecycle fields, reducer disposes, slice close archives). Slice #009 G5.

rule.name: sub-agent-heartbeat-progress-red-line
rule.description: Sub-agent heartbeat + dynamic progress red line — Dispatcher must see live progress during batch sync wait (sub-agent writes 30s heartbeat; Solo poller reads every 10s; status line + stale warning after 5min). Slice #009 G6.

rule.name: sub-agent-context-minimal-occupation
rule.description: Sub-agent context minimal-occupation red line — metadata-only dispatch records (path + size + sha256 + summary, ~200 chars/sub-agent) + 按需 Read, main LLM net context increase 3000-5000x lower. Slice #009 G7 (deferred to slice #010 implementation).

rule.name: sub-agent-shared-channel-cross-completion
rule.description: Cross sub-agent shared channel red line — sub-agent 完成即写 dispatcher 共享 channel (share CLI), in-flight sub-agent 可读 (shared-read CLI); 间接信号不破伪蜂群. Slice #009 G8 (deferred to slice #010 implementation).

rule.name: sub-agent-headroom-forced-compression-gate
rule.description: Forced compression gate red line — 75% soft warn + 80% hard reject via peaks CLI + PreToolUse hook double-guard; opt-in --use-headroom flag for headroom-ai integration. Slice #009 G9 (deferred to slice #010 implementation).
